name: TTC-resilient
description: Reliable telemetry, tracking, and command link designed to maintain contact in degraded conditions
modulationCodingAssumptions: BPSK/QPSK with heavy FEC (rate 1/2 LDPC or convolutional)

name: EO-highrate
description: High-rate Earth-observation imagery downlink optimized for throughput during short pass windows
modulationCodingAssumptions: 8PSK or 16APSK with rate 3/4 LDPC; ACM enabled

name: broadband-relay
description: GEO or MEO broadband relay service for user terminals and gateway feeder links
modulationCodingAssumptions: DVB-S2X with ACM up to 256APSK; multi-carrier

name: D2C-NTN
description: Direct-to-cell non-terrestrial network service for smartphone connectivity via LEO satellites
modulationCodingAssumptions: OFDM-based (NR-NTN); low-order modulation with repetition coding

name: inter-satellite
description: Optical or RF inter-satellite link for mesh or relay architectures
modulationCodingAssumptions: Optical: OOK/DPSK coherent; RF: high-order QAM

name: SIGINT-downlink
description: Secure high-bandwidth signals-intelligence data downlink with anti-jam features
modulationCodingAssumptions: Spread-spectrum with low probability of intercept; rate 1/2 turbo code

name: emergency-fallback
description: Minimal emergency beacon or safe-mode TT&C link using lowest-bandwidth most-robust mode available
modulationCodingAssumptions: BPSK rate 1/6 or lower; compatible with omni antennas
